subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Despair not of the Spirit of God and His mercy, and grieve not over aught in the days of God, the Lord of the mighty Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی لا تیاس من روح الله و رحمته و لا تحزن من شی فی ایام الله رب العرش العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
